answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving problems & thinking analytically
Data analysis, AI, or machine learning

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data engineer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: data engineer — Certification courses on Coursera
data engineer — Certification courses on Udemy
data engineer — Certification tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python and sql, etl/elt pipeline development, and data warehousing (snowflake, bigquery, redshift) — these are the essential building blocks for a data engineer

resources.title: data engineer — Core Skill Learning courses on Coursera
data engineer — Core Skill Learning courses on Udemy
data engineer — Core Skill Learning tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in apache spark and hadoop, cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp), and data modelling, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: data engineer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Coursera
data engineer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills courses on Udemy
data engineer — Intermediate / Advanced Skills tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying python and sql, and etl/elt pipeline development in realistic scenarios

resources.title: data engineer — Hands-on Practice courses on Coursera
data engineer — Hands-on Practice courses on Udemy
data engineer — Hands-on Practice tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: data engineer — Portfolio Building courses on Coursera
data engineer — Portfolio Building courses on Udemy
data engineer — Portfolio Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data engineer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: data engineer — CV / Profile Building courses on Coursera
data engineer — CV / Profile Building courses on Udemy
data engineer — CV / Profile Building tutorials on YouTube

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data engineer positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
